channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Father of girl injured by illegal migrant truck driver slams ‘insensitive’ rhetoric during Noem hearing
item.description: The father of girl injured by alleged illegal immigrant truck driver urges lawmakers to prioritize American safety during emotional House Judiciary he...

item.title: Dem Senate hopeful holds event at bookstore selling 'ABOLISH ICE' merch despite pledge to 'secure the border'
item.description: Dem Senate hopeful Zach Wahls told voters he believes in 'old Democratic values' and wants to 'secure the border,' but campaigned Saturday at a bookst...

item.title: Report: DOJ Hasn't Closed Autopen Investigation
item.description: The Department of Justice has not shelved its investigation into the use of autopens by White House aides who served in the Biden administration, thre...

item.title: Democrats Continue to Slow-Walk Funding of DHS With Latest House, Senate Votes; Watch a Dem Run Away
Dem lawmaker's illegal alien SOTU guest part of records dispute involving police reports: report
item.description: Rep. Seth Moulton's State of the Union guest reportedly referenced in sealed police reports that Massachusetts authorities have declined to release.

item.title: U.S. and Venezuela Restore Diplomatic Relations in New Major Breakthrough
Hegseth on Noem's Ouster: We Serve at the Pleasure of the President
item.description: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth praised Kristi Noem after she was fired by President Donald Trump on Thursday as secretary of homeland security.

item.title: Appeals Court Vacates Limits on Chicago ICE Operation
item.description: The Trump administration secured a victory Thursday when a federal appeals court vacated a lower-court ruling that placed use-of-force restrictions on...

item.title: Florida Bar Targets Trump Lawyer Lindsey Halligan
item.description: The Florida Bar has opened an ethics investigation into attorney Lindsey Halligan over criminal cases brought against former FBI Director James B. Com...

item.title: Breitbart Chief: Noem Ad Campaign 'Biggest Scandal' of Trump Administration
item.description: Breitbart Editor-in-Chief Alex Marlow told Newsmax on Thursday that a controversy over a multimillion-dollar border security ad campaign featuring Hom...

item.title: Dem Congressman Hardest Hit After Newspaper Digs Into Illegal Immigrant He Brought to the SOTU
So Long, 'ICE Barbie': As DHS Secretary, Kristi Noem Was the Architect of Her Own Demise
Spanberger refuses to honor ICE detainer in murder case, escalating showdown with Trump DHS
item.description: Virginia Gov. Spanberger faces GOP criticism for demanding federal warrant before releasing alleged murderer to ICE, sparking sanctuary state debate.

item.title: California voter ID initiative clears signature threshold, setting up November showdown with Newsom
item.description: A petition to require voter I.D. and allow only U.S. citizens to vote has blown well past the required 875,000-signature threshold to be added to the ...

item.title: Busted: Despite Newsom's Denials, Logs Reportedly Show Dalilah Coleman's Dad Did Call Governor's Office
